channel.title: Frontity Prerender support
channel.description:
Greetings!
I've been working with Frontity for a Wordpress site and have had a lot of success so far. I was recently looking into making use of prerendering for certain pages on my site where I am making use of dependencies for content, and was hoping to make use of a tool like react-snap. However I haven't had much luck. Was wondering if anyone else has tried to integrate prerendering as part of their build and if any success, hoping you can provide some guidance.
Many Thanks!

item.title: Frontity Prerender support
item.dc:creator: Hussein
item.description:
I will watch this threat as im also interested in this

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Prerender support
item.dc:creator: boomtechny
item.description:
Greetings!

I’ve been working with Frontity for a Wordpress site and have had a lot of success so far. I was recently looking into making use of prerendering for certain pages on my site where I am making use of dependencies for content, and was hoping to make use of a tool like react-snap. However I haven’t had much luck. Was wondering if anyone else has tried to integrate prerendering as part of their build and if any success, hoping you can provide some guidance.

Many Thanks!

Read full topic
